message:
fix(web): Fix featured-store includeInactive filter bug

The includeInactive and includeExpired filters were conflated because
isCurrentlyActive() checked both the isActive flag AND time bounds.

When includeInactive=true but includeExpired=false, inactive items were
still filtered out because isCurrentlyActive() returns false for inactive
items regardless of time bounds.

Fix: Separate the concerns:
- isWithinTimeWindow(): Only checks start/end time bounds
- isCurrentlyActive(): Checks isActive flag AND time bounds
- listFeaturedContent(): Uses appropriate helper for each filter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
